title: Swords to Machetes
description: Replaces all Minecraft swords with realistic survival machetes
body:
🔪 What changes

Wooden Sword → Baseball Bat

Stone / Iron / Gold / Diamond / Netherite Swords → Machetes

Each tier has its own visual identity, wear level and weight

Clean silhouettes, readable in inventory and combat

🎯 Design goals

No fantasy, no magic look

Modern, brutal, survival-focused aesthetic

Fits post-apocalyptic, zombie and urban scenarios

Works perfectly with animation/combat mods

✅ Compatibility

Vanilla-friendly (no OptiFine or CIT required)

Compatible with Better Combat and similar mods

Lightweight, client-side only

Can be used in any modpack, not tied to zombies only
